imaging_request.indication_text: Surveillance CT chest 6 months post-lobectomy for stage IIB NSCLC. Patient has stage 3 CKD (eGFR 38) — pulmonologist requesting contrast despite renal limitations.

clinical_indication.diagnosis_text: Malignant neoplasm of lower lobe, right bronchus
clinical_indication.supporting_notes: Pathologic staging pT2bN1M0, Stage IIB. Right lower lobectomy 2025-11-20. Adjuvant carboplatin/pemetrexed completed 2026-03. Comorbidities: COPD (FEV1 52% predicted), CKD stage 3 (eGFR 38), AFib on apixaban. Contrast concern: nephrologist consulted, recommends hydration protocol. Pulmonologist requests contrast for adequate mediastinal evaluation.
